---
title: "All 64 Hexagram Dossiers"
subtitle: "Complete structural registry of the King Wen sequence"
listing:
  - id: all-hexagrams
    contents: "hexagram-*.md"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, description]
---

## Full Hexagram Layer

This track contains dossier pages for all `64` hexagrams in the King Wen sequence.

Each page is a structural dossier rather than a finished commentary. The page fixes:

- the hexagram's binary word
- its trigram decomposition
- its relation to `X_6`
- its category memberships in the current 12-category Omega map
- the theorem-level Lean anchors currently carrying the strongest correspondence

## Reading Strategy

The cleanest reading order is:

1. Start from the [21 GMS-valid dossiers](../gms-valid/index.qmd) if you want the strongest formal correspondences first.
2. Use this full 64-page layer when you want to see how the entire King Wen sequence partitions into stable words and fold-required words.

:::{#all-hexagrams}
:::

---

[Back to I Ching Index](../index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../../index.qmd)
